problem: Implement Human Design Type, Authority, and Profile calculations with 64keys terminology - HIGH priority for complete chart readings
goal: Produce production-ready Type/Authority/Profile calculation system with HDType enum (Initiator/Builder/Specialist/Coordinator/Observer), Authority hierarchy, Profile model, and calculation functions integrated into RawBodyGraph

existing_patterns: src/human_design/models/core.py - Type-safe enums and Literal types
Channel formation logic (MUST BE COMPLETE FIRST)
architectural_foundation.calculation_dependencies: Type calculation requires defined_centers (from channel formation). Authority requires Type. Profile requires conscious/unconscious Sun line numbers.
architectural_foundation.terminology_standard: 64keys primary: Initiator/Builder/Specialist/Coordinator/Observer. Traditional names in docstrings only.

from_review_strand_d5a05df6.blocking_for: Complete chart readings and semantic overlays

type_logic.Initiator: Sacral undefined, Throat to motor (Root/Solar Plexus/Heart/Sacral)

authority_hierarchy: Ego Manifested (Heart to Throat, no Sacral)
Ego Projected (Heart defined, no motors to Throat)
Self-Projected (G-Center to Throat, no motors to Throat)

constraints: Work in strand fork space (automatic isolation branch)
PREREQUISITE: Channel formation logic MUST be implemented first
Use 64keys terminology as primary (Initiator, not Manifestor)
Follow RawBodyGraph architectural pattern (Pydantic v2, computed properties)
Calculation logic must match HD standards exactly
Include traditional HD names in docstrings for reference
Comprehensive test coverage with known chart validation
success_criteria: Authority enum with 7 authorities and hierarchy
Comprehensive pytest suite with parametrized tests

1_research.description: Research and validate Type/Authority/Profile calculation rules

tasks.task: Research HD Type/Authority/Profile calculation rules from existing documentation and 64keys examples. Document exact logic for each Type (center requirements), Authority hierarchy (decision-making order), Profile meanings (line combinations). Validate against multiple known charts.

2_architecture_design.description: Design Type/Authority/Profile models and calculation architecture

tasks.task: Design HDType enum, Authority enum, Profile model. Specify calculation functions (calculate_type, calculate_authority, calculate_profile) with clear logic. Design integration with RawBodyGraph computed properties. Ensure 64keys terminology primary, traditional in docstrings.

Implement src/human_design/models/type.py (HDType enum, calculate_type), authority.py (Authority enum, calculate_authority), profile.py (Profile model, calculate_profile). Add computed properties to RawBodyGraph. Follow Pydantic v2, type safety, 64keys terminology.

4_test_suite.description: Build comprehensive test suite for all calculations

tasks.task: Create test_type_calculation.py, test_authority_calculation.py, test_profile_calculation.py with pytest.mark.parametrize. Test all 5 Types, all 7 Authorities, all 12 Profiles. Use known charts from 64keys for validation. Test edge cases and hierarchy logic.

5_validation.description: Validate calculations against HD standards and 64keys data

tasks.task: Audit Type/Authority/Profile calculations for correctness against HD standards. Validate 64keys terminology usage. Check test coverage and accuracy on known charts. Verify mypy --strict compliance and architectural consistency.

6_synthesis.description: Synthesize implementation notes and usage guide

tasks.task: Synthesize complete implementation notes: calculation algorithms, 64keys terminology mappings, integration with RawBodyGraph, test strategy, known limitations, next steps. Include usage examples for developers.

structural: All enums use Python Enum with 64keys names
All models use Pydantic v2 BaseModel
Traditional HD terms ONLY in docstrings
semantic: 5 Types exactly (Initiator, Builder, Specialist, Coordinator, Observer)
Type calculation matches HD defined/undefined center rules
Profile derives from Sun line numbers (conscious/unconscious)
testing: Known charts validate against 64keys data (100% match)
Edge cases: Reflector (all undefined), pure Generator, etc.

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
